title: PS TPA
description: PS TPA is a lightweight and customizable teleport request plugin that adds easy-to-use TPA commands for players and admins, with smooth request handling and full message control.
body:
PS TPA is a lightweight and customizable teleport request plugin designed for Minecraft servers that want simple, reliable player teleportation without unnecessary complexity.

This plugin adds a complete TPA system that allows players to send teleport requests to each other or request players to teleport to them. All requests are handled safely, with options to accept, deny, cancel, or automatically accept teleport requests. Server owners can fully customize messages, permissions, and behavior through the configuration file.

PS TPA is built with performance and usability in mind, making it suitable for survival, SMP, and community servers of any size.

✨ Features

Send teleport requests to other players

Request players to teleport to you

Accept or deny teleport requests

Cancel sent requests

Toggle receiving teleport requests

Auto-accept mode for trusted players

Fully customizable messages via config

Permission-based command access

Lightweight and optimized for performance

Easy to configure and reload

📜 Commands

/pstpa <player> – Send a teleport request

/pstpahere <player> – Request a player to teleport to you

/pstpaccept – Accept a teleport request

/pstpdeny – Deny a teleport request

/pstpcancel – Cancel your sent request

/pstptoggle – Enable or disable receiving requests

(Admin commands may be available depending on configuration.)
new update command /tpa finaly added

⚙️ Customization

All messages, request settings, cooldowns, and permissions can be configured to match your server’s style. This allows PS TPA to fit both casual and advanced server setups.

🎯 Purpose

The goal of PS TPA is to provide a clean, flexible, and user-friendly teleport request system without bloating your server or confusing players.
